articles.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: Steadies below 1.1800 near eight-week highs
articles.expand: EUR/USD remains calm after halting its seven-day winning streak, trading around 1.1790 during the Asian hours on Wednesday. The daily chart technical analysis indicates a bullish bias, as the pair is moving upwards within an ascending channel.

articles.title: USD/JPY Price Forecast: Defends 200-SMA support on H4; bulls seem hesitant near 159.00
articles.expand: The USD/JPY pair once again shows some resilience below the 200-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) on the 4-hour chart and edges higher during the Asian session on Wednesday. Spot prices, however, lack bullish conviction and struggle to capitalize on the strength beyond the 159.00 mark.
